name: url
label: URL
help: Instagram Reel URL, e.g. https://instagram.com/reel/ID/. The URL platform must match this tool's platform. Do not pass cross-platform URLs, e.g. YouTube to TikTok, Instagram to Facebook, LinkedIn to X/Twitter, or Pinterest to Rumble.

name: language
label: Language
help: Preferred caption language as an ISO code, e.g. "en". Defaults to auto-detect.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Set true to serve from the 24h response cache. Default false — always fetch fresh data.
